overview: Dr. Hormone MD specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for patients aged 40 and older. The practice restores hormone balance using bioidentical hormones, peptides, and GLP-1 medications through in-person and telehealth appointments.
highlights: Medical weight loss with GLP-1 medications
targetAudience: Adults 40 and older experiencing menopause, andropause, low sex drive, weight gain, or other hormone-related concerns.
